title: Taylor’s University Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Business 2026: Complete Guide to Admission, Fees, Duration, Research Areas, Scholarships & Career Opportunities
summary: Pursuing a Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Business is one of the highest academic achievements for professionals, researchers, educators, and future industry leaders seeking to contribute meaningful knowledge to the global business landscape. Taylor s University, one of Malaysia s leading private universities, offers a comprehensive PhD in Business programme that equips candidates with advanced research capabilities while allowing them to investigate real-world business challenges. Whether your interests lie in entrepreneurship, finance, marketing, supply chain management, leadership, or human capital development, this doctoral programme provides an excellent platform to develop innovative solutions that influence academia, industry, and public policy. Applications are currently open across multiple intakes in 2026, giving prospective candidates flexibility in planning their doctoral journey. Why Study the PhD in Business at Taylor s University? Taylor s University has established itself as one of Asia s leading higher education institutions, known for academic excellence, impactful research, and strong industry collaboration. The Doctor of Philosophy in Business is specifically designed for individuals who wish to: Develop advanced research competencies. Produce original contributions to business knowledge. Address contemporary business and economic challenges. Work closely with internationally recognised academics. Build expertise that supports careers in academia, consulting, policymaking, entrepreneurship, and executive leadership. Unlike coursework-based postgraduate degrees, this programme focuses extensively on independent research guided by experienced supervisors. Programme Overview The Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Business allows students to conduct rigorous research across numerous business disciplines while developing strong analytical, methodological, and critical thinking skills. Students have the opportunity to investigate topics including: Entrepreneurship Human Capital Development Financial Economics Investment Marketing Supply Chain Management Managerial Leadership Business Innovation Strategic Management Organisational Behaviour Corporate Governance International Business Business Sustainability Throughout the programme, students are encouraged to generate original knowledge that contributes to academic literature while offering practical solutions to business challenges. Because Taylor s prioritises quality supervision, only a limited number of doctoral candidates are admitted during each intake, allowing supervisors to provide personalised academic guidance. Research Environment One of the strongest advantages of the programme is its research-focused learning environment. Students benefit from: Supervision by experienced academics Access to internationally recognised researchers Collaboration opportunities Research seminars Academic workshops Professional networking Publication support Access to modern research facilities Taylor s also highlights that many of its academics are recognised among the Stanford World s Top 2% Scientists , offering students valuable mentorship throughout their doctoral studies. Programme Duration The programme offers flexible study options suitable for both working professionals and full-time researchers. Full-Time 3 to 6 years Part-Time 4 to 8 years This flexibility enables candidates to balance research with professional or personal commitments. Study Modes Applicants may choose from: Full-Time Part-Time The programme also offers: Normal Mode Prior Publication Mode This flexibility accommodates candidates with different research backgrounds and academic goals. 2026 Intake Months Taylor s University offers several admission opportunities throughout the year. Available intakes include: February April June September October Since admissions are selective, prospective applicants are encouraged to apply early. Tuition Fees The published tuition fees for 2026 are: Local Students Normal Mode MYR 51,560 Prior Publication Mode MYR 34,640 International Students Normal Mode USD 18,474 Prior Publication Mode USD 13,589 Applicants should note: Fees are reviewed annually. Effective 1 July 2025, a 6% Service Tax applies to non-Malaysian citizens on applicable fees (excluding International Security Deposit and EMGS application fees). Scholarships and Financial Support Taylor s University encourages prospective doctoral students to explore available scholarship opportunities and financial aid schemes that may help reduce the cost of study. Applicants are advised to review the university s scholarship offerings before applying. Why Choose Taylor s University for Your PhD? Several factors distinguish Taylor s PhD in Business from many doctoral programmes. These include: 1. Research Excellence Students conduct original research addressing contemporary business challenges. 2. Expert Academic Supervision Candidates receive guidance from internationally recognised scholars. 3. Flexible Learning Both full-time and part-time options are available. 4. Multiple Annual Intakes Five admission periods provide flexibility for applicants. 5. Strong Research Community Students collaborate with fellow researchers and industry experts. 6. Career Development Graduates gain advanced research, analytical, leadership, and academic skills. Admission Process Taylor s University has streamlined the application process for prospective doctoral candidates. Applicants should: Review admission requirements. Prepare all required academic documents. Submit an online application. Provide any additional documentation requested. Await confirmation from the admissions office. The university provides comprehensive admissions guidance through its official admissions portal. Who Should Apply? This programme is ideal for: University lecturers Academic researchers Business professionals Consultants Policy analysts Entrepreneurs Corporate executives Government officers NGO professionals Individuals seeking careers in research or higher education Candidates with strong research interests and a passion for advancing business knowledge will particularly benefit from the programme. Career Opportunities Graduates of the Doctor of Philosophy in Business can pursue careers across academia, government, multinational corporations, consulting firms, research institutions, and international organisations. Potential career pathways include: University Professor Lecturer Senior Research Fellow Business Consultant Corporate Strategist Policy Researcher Economist Executive Director Innovation Manager Entrepreneurship Advisor Business Development Director Research and Development Manager Think Tank Researcher The advanced research skills acquired throughout the programme are highly valued across numerous industries. Academic Experience at Taylor s University Taylor s University emphasises an ecosystem that nurtures intellectual development, creativity, and practical wisdom. Students benefit from: Collaborative learning Industry engagement Alumni networking Academic conferences Research seminars Cross-disciplinary collaboration Modern campus facilities This environment supports both academic excellence and professional growth. Important Information Applicants should note: Limited doctoral places are available each intake. Early application is highly recommended. Tuition fees are subject to annual review. International students may be subject to additional government-related charges and taxes. Learn more and Apply Here Final Thoughts Taylor s University continues to position itself as a leading destination for postgraduate research in Asia. Its Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Business programme offers aspiring researchers the opportunity to investigate critical business issues, contribute original scholarship, and work alongside internationally recognised academics. With flexible study options, multiple annual intakes, comprehensive research support, and access to world-class supervision, this doctoral programme provides an excellent pathway for individuals seeking careers in academia, research, policy, or executive leadership. Prospective candidates interested in shaping the future of business through rigorous research should consider applying early to secure a place in this competitive programme. For more information, visit the official website Discover global scholarship opportunities on OFY, VISIT HERE The post Taylor’s University Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Business 2026: Complete Guide to Admission, Fees, Duration, Research Areas, Scholarships Career Opportunities appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .
